original_image_tags: A single page of a typed memorandum on official Federal Bureau of Investigation letterhead. The paper appears aged and slightly textured. There is a circular FBI seal in the upper left corner. The text is typewritten in a monospaced font, typical of a typewriter. Two large punch holes are visible at the top center. A few dark smudges or holes are present near the top margin.

elements.description: Department of Justice, Federal Bureau of Investigation seal located at the top left corner of the page.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the presence of an FBI seal in the top left corner, but description A adds details about punch holes and smudges that B omits, with no contradictions.
